# Nested Note

This note lives in a subdirectory. It tests that relative paths are handled correctly (e.g., `nested/deep-note.md` as the filename key).

## Section One

Some content in the first section to test chunking with headings.

## Section Two

More content here. Each section should ideally map to its own chunk if they're long enough, or be merged if they're short.
